title: ApiCallEvent
description: SAP RFC call event published by M1 (API Gateway Shield) to the rfc_events stream.

rfc_function.description: SAP RFC function module name (e.g. RFC_READ_TABLE)

client_ip.description: IP address of the calling client

user_id.description: SAP user ID making the call

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the call

rows_returned.description: Number of data rows returned by the RFC call

sap_system.description: SAP system ID (optional, e.g. PRD, QA)
